title: phoenicanthemum coccineum
intro: Phoenicanthemum coccineum, also known as the Chinese rose, is a flowering plant native to China and a member of the Rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phoenicanthemum coccineum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting skin health. Herbal preparations of Phoenicanthemum coccineum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
